attributes.title: HTTP — handler logs (correlate)
attributes.description: Controller request received / succeeded / failed lines. Filter by request_id (click a link in SQL CRUD, or add request_id: \"…\" in the bar).

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"_exists_: request_id and _exists_: controller and (message: *request received* or message: *succeeded* or message: *failed* or message: *not found*) and not message: *result*","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
